headline: Leveraged ETF Goes Haywire in Korea With Wrong-Way 40% Moves
summary: (Bloomberg) -- A leveraged exchange-traded fund tracking SK Hynix Inc. deviated sharply from the underlying stock’s move for a second day, underscoring the risk of investing in such products that have attracted strong retail interest. headline: Anthropic Advisor Says AI Productivity Gains Are Vastly Exaggerated, Valuations Are ‘Crazy’
summary: Eric Ries, author of the legendary book The Lean Startup and, more recently, Incorruptible, and a governance advisor to Anthropic since 2021, delivered a sharp critique of the AI investment boom. He told CNBC’s Squawk Box on June 8, 2026, that he believed corporate AI productivity claims are largely unproven. He believes many AI-attributed layoffs are repackaged cost-cutting, and ... headline: How The Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Narrative Is Shifting With Reset Valuations And Mixed Analyst Views
summary: Intuitive Surgical’s fair value estimate has been reset from US$611.82 to US$565.25, signaling a lower price target that analysts are now using in their models. This shift lines up with recent research that blends optimism about the company’s long term growth potential with caution around weaker medtech sentiment and a reset in sector valuations, leaving opinions on the stock’s risk reward profile divided. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative may shape how you track...
